/usr/bin/ar qc libpqc.a CMakeFiles/pqc_static.dir/src/core/common/ct_ops.c.o CMakeFiles/pqc_static.dir/src/core/common/mem.c.o CMakeFiles/pqc_static.dir/src/core/common/rand.c.o /usr/bin/ranlib libpqc.a
